aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.description: Your destination for premium, authentic fragrances. We bring the world's most exquisite scents to your doorstep.
aboutPage.storyP1: Founded in 2020, Beb Fragrance was born from a simple passion: the love of extraordinary fragrances. What started as a small boutique has grown into one of the most trusted names in luxury perfumery.
aboutPage.storyP2: We believe that a fragrance is more than just a scent—it's a memory, an emotion, a statement. That's why we travel the world to find the most captivating perfumes from legendary houses and emerging artisans.
aboutPage.storyP3: Our commitment to authenticity means that every bottle we sell is guaranteed genuine. We work directly with manufacturers and authorized distributors to ensure that what you receive is exactly what the perfumer intended.
aboutPage.storyP4: Today, we are proud to serve thousands of customers who trust us to deliver not just products, but experiences that last a lifetime.
aboutPage.value1Desc: We source only the finest ingredients from renowned perfume houses around the world.
aboutPage.value2Desc: Every fragrance in our collection is 100% authentic and comes directly from the manufacturer.
aboutPage.value3Desc: We believe that fragrance is an art form, and we curate our collection with an eye for sophistication.
aboutPage.value4Desc: Our team of fragrance experts is dedicated to helping you find your signature scent.
aboutPage.ctaDesc: Explore our curated collection of premium fragrances

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.description: Find answers to common questions about our products and services.
faqPage.q1: How do I choose the right fragrance?
faqPage.a1: Start by identifying your preferred scent family: floral, oriental, woody, or fresh. Our product pages include detailed descriptions and notes to help you decide. You can also contact our fragrance experts for personalized recommendations.
faqPage.q2: What are top, heart, and base notes?
faqPage.a2: Top notes are the initial scents you smell immediately after application (lasting 15-30 minutes). Heart notes emerge as top notes fade (lasting 2-4 hours). Base notes are the foundation of the fragrance (lasting 4-8+ hours).
faqPage.a3: Eau de Parfum (EDP) typically lasts 4-8 hours, while Eau de Toilette (EDT) lasts 2-4 hours. Longevity depends on skin type, application method, and environmental factors.
faqPage.a4: Yes! We offer free standard shipping on orders over $100. Orders under $100 have a flat shipping rate of $9.99.
faqPage.a5: We accept returns within 30 days of purchase. Items must be unopened and in original packaging with seals intact. Refunds are processed within 5-10 business days.
faqPage.a6: Absolutely. Every fragrance we sell is 100% authentic and sourced directly from the manufacturer or authorized distributors.
faqPage.a7: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries worldwide. International shipping rates vary by destination.
faqPage.q8: How can I track my order?
faqPage.a8: Once your order is shipped, you will receive a confirmation email with a tracking number.
faqPage.q9: Can I cancel or modify my order?
faqPage.a9: Orders can be cancelled or modified within 1 hour of placement. After that, the order enters processing.
faqPage.a10: Yes, we offer complimentary gift wrapping on all orders. Simply select the gift wrap option at checkout.
faqPage.q11: How do I store my perfume?
faqPage.a11: Store your fragrance in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and heat. Keep the bottle tightly closed.
faqPage.q12: What payment methods do you accept?
faqPage.a12: We accept major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover), Stripe, and Cash on Delivery.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.description: Have a question? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
contactPage.validationName: Name must be at least 2 characters
contactPage.validationSubject: Subject must be at least 5 characters
contactPage.validationMessage: Message must be at least 10 characters
contactPage.successMessage: Message sent successfully! We will get back to you soon.
contactPage.errorMessage: Failed to send message. Please try again.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.s1Desc: By accessing or using the Beb Fragrance website, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our website.
termsPage.s2Desc: We strive to display our products and pricing accurately. However, we reserve the right to correct any errors and to change prices at any time without prior notice. All prices are in USD.
termsPage.s3Desc: All payments are processed securely through our payment partners. By providing a payment method, you represent that you are authorized to use that payment method.
termsPage.s4Desc: For questions about these Terms, please contact our support desk via our contact email.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.s1Desc: When you visit our website, we may collect certain information about you, including your name, email address, phone number, shipping address, and payment information when you make a purchase. We also collect information about your browsing behavior through cookies and similar technologies.
privacyPage.s2Desc: We use the information we collect to process and fulfill your orders, communicate with you about your orders and account, send marketing communications (with your consent), improve our website and customer experience, and comply with legal obligations.
privacyPage.s3Desc: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties without your consent, except for trusted third parties who assist us in operating our website, conducting our business, or servicing you. These parties agree to keep your information confidential.
privacyPage.s4Desc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at our email address.

shippingPage.title: Shipping Policy
shippingPage.description: Everything you need to know about our shipping process.
shippingPage.s1Desc: All orders are processed within 1-2 business days (excluding weekends and holidays). You will receive a confirmation email once your order has been shipped.
shippingPage.s3Desc: We ship to over 50 countries worldwide. International shipping rates are calculated at checkout based on destination and package weight. Delivery typically takes 7-14 business days.
shippingPage.s4Desc: Once your order ships, you will receive a confirmation email with a tracking number. You can track your package through our website or directly on the carrier's website.

returnsPage.title: Returns & Refunds
returnsPage.description: We want you to love your fragrance. Here's our return policy.
returnsPage.s1Desc: You have 30 calendar days from the date of delivery to return an item. To be eligible for a return, the item must be unused, unopened, and in the same condition that you received it. It must also be in the original packaging with all seals intact.
returnsPage.step1: Contact our customer service team to initiate a return.
returnsPage.step2: You will receive a Return Authorization Number (RMA) and return shipping label.
returnsPage.step3: Package the item securely in its original packaging.
returnsPage.step4: Ship the item back using the provided return label.
returnsPage.step5: Once received, we will inspect the item and process your refund.
returnsPage.s3Desc: Refunds are processed within 5-10 business days after we receive and inspect the returned item. The refund will be credited to the original payment method. Please note that shipping charges are non-refundable.
returnsPage.s4Desc: For hygiene reasons, we cannot accept returns on opened or used fragrances. Gift cards are non-returnable. Sale items are final sale and cannot be returned.

whyChooseUs.eyebrow: Only High Quality Is The Only Way

whyChooseUs.description: From authentic perfumes to gift-ready packaging, every detail is tailored to feel elegant, smooth, and trustworthy.
